description:
A spin-off of the Embryonic Hub focused on managing development activities and structuring contributor relationships. 

The entity will hire and pay contributors, receive invoices from builders and suppliers, process payments, and provide operational support for team members working in network organizations.

The Network Operational Hub is structured as a Swiss Association — a cost‑efficient, tax‑optimized, and flexible legal form that offers strong privacy protections* in a reputable European jurisdiction.

**Typical Use Cases**

- Networks with recurring development budgets
- Permanent or semi‑permanent contributor groups
- Multi‑team and multi‑project ecosystems

Suitable networks that have outgrown embryonic coordination and require a dedicated procurement and execution layer.
setupServices: Legal document assembler for setting up (and winding down) a Swiss Association
Founding meeting and document review by local counsel *
Payment processor and contributor billing setup
summary: The procurement and contributor coordination hub for an active network.
title: Network Operational Hub
